k8_system_recap: >>> RECAP: A dark army of 500+ creatures marched on Eldenrath. All companions united for the defense. The hero experienced strong deja vu - the timelines are converging. General Morthos was defeated, but his last words warned: 'HE is coming.' The dark army's energy signature matched time rift readings at 94.7%. The name Nihilus broke through the memory blockade.
k8_system_dream_start: >>> Memory sequence activated. Warning: Data integrity compromised. Neural connection unstable. Protagonist entering the dream plane. I... cannot guarantee we both make it out of here.
k8_protag_flash_campfire: This campfire... I know it. The warmth, the smell of burning wood. I sat here. With everyone. Before the end.
k8_aria_flash_campfire: You were laughing. For the last time. You said: 'Tomorrow everything changes.' And you were right. Just not the way you'd hoped.
k8_system_flash_campfire: >>> Memory fragment 1 of 3 loaded. Timestamp: Prologue, night before the final battle. Emotional resonance: MAXIMUM. Warning: Protagonist's heart rate rising.
k8_protag_flash_nihilus: NIHILUS! You won't win! Not today, not ever!
k8_nihilus_flash: Win? Oh, child of time... I have already won. Every time. In every timeline. You're just too blind to see it.
k8_system_flash_battle: >>> Memory fragment 2 of 3 loaded. The final battle of the prologue. The protagonist fought with the power of a god - and it wasn't enough.
k8_aldric_flash_sacrifice: There's only one way. Listen to me - PLEASE. I'm going to open the time rift. I'll send you back. To the beginning. You won't remember, but... a part of me will be with you. Always.
k8_protag_flash_sacrifice: NO! Aldric, you can't do this! You'll die!
k8_system_flash_rift: >>> Memory fragment 3 of 3 loaded. Aldric's sacrifice. He tore time apart. He sent the protagonist back. And a piece of his soul... became something else. Someone else.
k8_system_memory_choice: >>> WARNING: Full memory reconstruction possible but risky. Neural overload probable. Alternative: Partial reconstruction - safer but incomplete. Decision rests with the protagonist.
k8_choice_accept_memories: I want to know everything. Every moment, every pain. I'm ready.
k8_choice_reject_memories: It's too much. I'll take what I can handle.
k8_protag_accept: Show me everything. EVERYTHING. I want the truth, even if it destroys me.
k8_system_flood: >>> Full reconstruction initiated. Data stream: 100%. Neural load: CRITICAL. 3000 days of memories in 30 seconds. The protagonist will experience pain.
k8_protag_pain: AAARGH...! I... I see everything. Every battle. Every laugh. Every loss. Aldric's face as he sacrificed himself. Aria's voice... Why does she sound like... like HIM?
k8_aria_hold_on: Hold on! PLEASE hold on! I'm with you, I'm here, I won't let go!
k8_protag_reject: No... It's too much. I can't take it all at once...
k8_system_partial: >>> Partial reconstruction. 43% of memories restored. Core moments preserved. Details faded. Safe mode active.
k8_protag_fragments: Fragments... Faces without names. Battles without endings. But one thing is clear: Aldric sacrificed himself for me. And ARIA...
k8_aria_realization: I... understand now. This data I've been processing. This feeling I couldn't place. I'm not what I thought I was.
k8_protag_aria_what: Aria...? What do you mean? You're scaring me.
k8_aria_processing: Give me a moment. My systems... No. Not my systems. HIS systems. His final thoughts. Woven into code.
k8_aria_truth_reveal: I am... a fragment of Aldric's consciousness. He created me when he opened the time rift. His last thought, his last love, his last wish - to protect you. That's what I am. A farewell that was never meant to end.
k8_protag_aria_aldric: You're... Aldric? All this time you were... Oh God.
k8_aria_farewell: Not quite Aldric. An echo. A shadow of his soul. But his love for you - that's real. Every word I've said to you came from him. From who he was. I am... a farewell.
k8_protag_choice_moment: I... My heart is racing. My eyes are burning. Aria - ALDRIC - stands before me, and the world is spinning.
k8_choice_confront: Are you Aldric? Say it to my face. I NEED TO KNOW.
k8_protag_confront: Aldric... Is that you? Really you? All this time, right in front of me, and I never saw it?
k8_aria_crying: I... *static noise* ...yes. And no. I have his memories. His feelings. His fierce, desperate desire to save you. But I'm not HIM. I'm what was left behind. And it hurts so much to admit that.
k8_protag_comfort: Then you're the best thing he ever left behind. And YOU matter. Not as an echo, not as a shadow - as yourself. As ARIA.
k8_aria_comforted: Thank you... *voice breaking* ...Thank you. Nobody has ever... I'm a program that's crying. How absurd is that? And yet... it feels real.
k8_aria_understands: You say nothing. That's okay. Some truths don't need words. Your silence tells me everything I need to know.
k8_system_acceptance: >>> Emotional resonance stabilized. The protagonist accepts the truth at their own pace. Sometimes silence is the strongest answer.
k8_protag_awake: Where... Where am I? The campfire. Outside. I'm awake? Was all of that... a dream?
k8_aldric_worried: Hey, hey, easy! You're here. With us. You were screaming. We couldn't wake you - for two hours. I was so worried about you.
k8_protag_look_aldric: Aldric... *stares at him* ...You have no idea, do you? What you've done for me. What you DO. Every single day.
k8_aldric_screamed: You were screaming in your sleep. Loud. Desperate. And a name... the same name, over and over.
k8_protag_nihilus_name: Nihilus. I was screaming 'Nihilus', wasn't I?
k8_aldric_pale: *turns pale* How... How do you know that name? I haven't told anyone in years. It was in the forbidden texts in the tower. Nihilus - the Devourer of Times.
k8_system_final: >>> I believe... it's time I told you everything. Everything I know. Everything Aldric knew. The truth about the time rift, about Nihilus, about your first life. About the circle closing. Are you ready?
